Building fast with governance, flexibility, and auditability is what separates prototypes from production. This workshop takes you from idea to production-hardened code on AWS.

Part 1: Spec-Driven Development with Kiro. Most AI projects fail because the spec never existed. Kiro enforces a spec-first discipline: structured requirements → design contract → code. You'll walk through the full lifecycle and learn how Hooks enforce engineering standards continuously.

Part 2: AI-Native Coding with Claude Code & Codex on Amazon Bedrock. With the spec locked, speed meets governance — 10x velocity while every byte stays inside your AWS boundary, with IAM, guardrails, and full CloudTrail auditability. An orchestrated system of agents with shared memory, tools, and governance is production architecture. Bedrock AgentCore provides the runtime, memory, and orchestration backbone to deploy multi-agent systems from any framework — LangGraph, CrewAI, or custom — on fully managed infrastructure. This workshop covers AgentCore Runtime, episodic and semantic memory systems, supervisor and collaborative orchestration patterns, and the AgentCore Gateway for routing, versioning, and traffic management. You'll build a working multi-agent system with memory, tool use, and Code Interpreter from scratch."},{time:"14:30",end:"16:00",host:"Tiny Fish",speaker:"Huy Vo",label:"Give Any AI Agent Live, Production-Grade Access to the Real Web",tone:"workshop",description:`A 90-minute live-demo workshop. This is a demo-and-showcase session, not a hands-on build-along. Builders watch real agents work across the tracks, understand the tech that makes it reliable in production, and leave with the sample-agent recipes and credits to rebuild it for their own hackathon project.`},{time:"16:00",end:"16:30",label:"Teabreak",tone:"break"},{time:"16:30",end:"18:00",host:"AWS",speaker:"Vu Pham",linkedin:"https://www.linkedin.com/in/vupa/",label:"Design Patterns & Best Practices — Testing, Monitoring & Production Readiness",tone:"workshop",luma:"https://luma.com/1nubtbgt",description:'"It works on my machine" is not a deployment strategy. Every attendee gets $25 in Apify credits plus a step-by-step guide to monetizing AI agents and participating in Apify prizes."},{time:"12:00",end:"14:00",host:"Langfuse × ClickHouse",label:"Langfuse × ClickHouse",tone:"workshop",luma:"https://luma.com/8zn9khl4"},{time:"14:00",end:"15:00",host:"Google Developer Experts",speaker:"Linh Nguyen",linkedin:"https://www.linkedin.com/in/linhnguyenkhanh/",label:"Beyond Autocomplete: How Agentic AI Solves the Enterprise Design Bottleneck",tone:"workshop",luma:"https://luma.com/gaf-idob",lumaId:"evt-ja1zqmbFpmpAY4M",description:`Generative AI promised relief for teams producing design content at scale — but most models still hit the same wall: they generate plausible pixels, not usable systems. This session unpacks why that gap is a category problem, not a quality one, and how agentic AI closes it by moving beyond prompt-based "autocomplete" into goal-oriented systems that plan, execute, and self-correct toward a brand-valid result. Using Obello's work as a running example, we'll look at treating brand guidelines as executable constraints — unlocking one-click responsive layouts and constraint-based resizing across effectively infinite aspect ratios, with brand consistency enforced rather than hoped for. Expect a candid, demo-driven walkthrough of AI systems that solve real design problems and return designers to their highest-value role: strategy, judgment, and taste.`},{time:"15:00",end:"16:00",host:"Antitech",speaker:'Achraf "Ash" Jday',linkedin:"https://www.linkedin.com/in/achrafjday/",label:"Securing Agentic AI: From AI Security Fundamentals to Hands-on Agent Assessment with the Antitech SDK",tone:"workshop",luma:"https://luma.com/7l5r8205",description:"As AI agents move from demos into real products, the security model changes. Prompt injection, indirect prompt injection, unsafe tool use, memory poisoning, data leakage, weak guardrails, and policy bypasses become product, compliance, and enterprise-readiness problems. This workshop introduces the new security challenges of agentic AI, then turns those concepts into hands-on practice using Antitech's SDK. We'll start by democratising AI security — what can go wrong, why traditional application security isn't enough for agentic systems, and how to test and harden agents before deployment. The second part focuses on practical workflows: using Antitech SDK modules to assess agents, generate structured Agent Assessment Reports, identify vulnerabilities, and apply hardening patterns such as PII/data obfuscation, safer input/output handling, and anti-prompt-injection defenses. Leave with a security-native mindset and a practical way to evaluate the agents you build during Agentic AI Build Week."},{time:"18:00",end:"20:00",label:"Builder Night · Special Announcements",tone:"signature"}]},{day:"04",weekday:"Sat",dateLabel:"July 11",theme:"Build",venue:"Galaxy Innovation Park",mapUrl:"https://maps.app.goo.gl/HTcd3hWcVEwbco5EA",venueImage:"/venues/galaxy-innovation-park.webp",workshops:[],signatureItems:["Keynotes","Expert Parade + Networking","Late-night build"],blocks:[{time:"09:00",label:"Opening Ceremony + Keynotes",tone:"signature"},{time:"09:30",label:"Expert Parade + Networking",tone:"signature"},{time:"12:00",end:"13:00",label:"Lunch Break",tone:"break"},{time:"18:00",end:"20:00",label:"VIP Dinner",tone:"signature"},{time:"20:00",label:"Late Night Build",tone:"workshop"}]},{day:"05",weekday:"Sun",dateLabel:"July 12",theme:"Demo",venue:"Galaxy Innovation Park",mapUrl:"https://maps.app.goo.gl/HTcd3hWcVEwbco5EA",venueImage:"/venues/galaxy-innovation-park.webp",workshops:[],signatureItems:["Demo Day","Award Ceremony"],blocks:[{time:"09:00",label:"Demo Day",tone:"signature"},{time:"12:00",end:"13:00",label:"Lunch Break",tone:"break"},{time:"14:30",end:"16:00",label:"Awards Ceremony",tone:"signature"}]}]
